title: Being admin of two accounts

posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

Does anywone know if we can be admin of two accounts for two different organizations ? I think it is possible because I saw that you can transfer a board from one account to another.

Thank you for your help, have a great day,

Corentin

posts.author: Chang (Chang-Ching)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Corentin,
I am the Admin of two accounts. You just need to register a new account using the same email as your previous account.
Each account has its own link, and you can log in to all accounts at the same time. I simply put bookmarks to go to my accounts and open individual tabs on my browser.

Hope it helps.

posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Chang

Thank you for your help ! I will follow your instructions.

Have a great day,

Corentin
